projects.title: My projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of the most outstanding works where I have applied my development knowledge.

ciclo-bnb.title: CicloBnB
ciclo-bnb.description: A project for renting bicycles between users (Airbnb style).

stream-sync.title: Stream Sync
stream-sync.description: Platform that centralizes different streaming platforms into a single application, using various APIs, user management and data collection.

anime-view.title: AnimeViewApp
anime-view.description: Application for viewing and tracking anime without using an external API, scraping data directly from various websites, managing and showing it in a clear and simple way.

flutter-anime.title: Flutter Anime App
flutter-anime.description: Mobile app developed with Flutter for exploring anime content, managing and showing it in a clear and simple way, using an API to facilitate its use.

zone-lock.title: ZoneLock
zone-lock.description: Smartwatch application to manage the effort being exerted in different exercises to get more accurate measurements.

portfolio-google.title: Google Style Portfolio
portfolio-google.description: A personal portfolio designed to mimic the Google aesthetics
